title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: HCL Digital Experience is affected by an OS command injection vulnerability in the Digital Asset...
description: HCL Digital Experience is affected by an OS command injection vulnerability in the Digital Asset Management API.  An attacker may execute arbitrary operating system commands, typically inheriting the privileges of the vulnerable application, which could possibly lead to a complete system takeover and data compromise.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The OS command injection vulnerability in the Digital Asset Management API of HCL Digital Experience allows attackers to execute arbitrary operating system commands. This could lead to a complete system takeover, unauthorized access to sensitive data, and potential disruption of services.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patch or update provided by HCL to address CVE-2026-21837.
Restrict access to the Digital Asset Management API to trusted IPs or internal networks using firewalls or access control lists.
Conduct a thorough review of system logs and monitor for any unusual activity that may indicate exploitation attempts.

title: A flaw was found in org.keycloak.services. An administrator with delegated access to read group...
description: A flaw was found in org.keycloak.services. An administrator with delegated access to read group memberships and users can bypass user profile permissions by accessing the group members endpoint. This allows the administrator to view user attributes that are explicitly configured to be denied, leading to information disclosure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9088.

title: A flaw was found in ansible-core. The ansible-galaxy role install command processes dependency...
description: A flaw was found in ansible-core. The ansible-galaxy role install command processes dependency specifications from a role's meta/requirements.yml file. Due to improper neutralization of argument delimiters, a malicious role author can inject arbitrary git configuration flags through the src field. This allows arbitrary code execution on the machine of a user who installs the role via ansible-galaxy role install.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in ansible-core allows a malicious role author to execute arbitrary code on the machine of users who install roles via ansible-galaxy. This could lead to unauthorized system access, data theft, or further exploitation of the affected system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update ansible-core to the latest patched version that addresses CVE-2026-11332.
Review and validate all third-party roles and dependencies before installation, especially those from untrusted or unknown sources.
Implement strict access controls and monitoring on systems where ansible-galaxy is used to detect and respond to potential exploitation attempts.

title: All versions of the package decompress are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write via Archive...
description: All versions of the package decompress are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write via Archive Extraction (Zip Slip) when extracting a ZIP archive containing two entries with the same path - the first being a symlink to an arbitrary target and the second being a regular file - the file content is written through the symlink to the target location outside the output directory. This is due to the microtask processing order that checks readlink for the second file before resolving symlink for the first

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10732.

title: Improper Authentication, Missing authentication for critical function, Weak Authentication...
description:
Improper Authentication, Missing authentication for critical function, Weak Authentication vulnerability in DTS Electronics Industry and Trade Ltd. Co. Redline WR3200 allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs.

This issue affects Redline WR3200: from 7.1.3 before 7.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized access to critical functions due to improper or missing authentication mechanisms. This could lead to unauthorized control, data breaches, or disruption of services, particularly in environments where the Redline WR3200 is deployed.
recommended_actions: Immediately update all Redline WR3200 devices to firmware version 7.1.8 or later to address the vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of all devices in the network to ensure proper access control configurations and authentication mechanisms are in place.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity or unauthorized access attempts, and implement additional network segmentation to limit the potential impact of exploitation.

title: Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input vulnerability in ShapedPlugin, LLC Product...
description:
Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input vulnerability in ShapedPlugin, LLC Product Slider Pro for WooCommerce allows Malicious Software Implanted.

This issue affects Product Slider Pro for WooCommerce: from n/a before 3.5.3.

No patched version is available - the vendor has applied a fix to an existing release without publishing a new version. While the patch provided by the vendor is valid, releasing it under the existing version number leaves users unable to reliably determine whet

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49777.

title: HCL Digital Experience Compose is affected by a reflected cross-site scripting (XSS)...
description: HCL Digital Experience Compose is affected by a reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the search center.  An attacker could execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or phishing attacks.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by HCL for Digital Experience Compose.
Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent malicious scripts from being executed.
Educate users on identifying phishing attempts and suspicious browser behaviors.

title: HCL Digital Experience and HCL Digital Experience Compose could be susceptible to Host header...
description: HCL Digital Experience and HCL Digital Experience Compose could be susceptible to Host header injection.  An attacker can manipulate the Host header and cause the application to behave in unexpected ways.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21826.

title: A vulnerability in the JCE editor extension for Joomla allows the creation of new editor profiles...
description: A vulnerability in the JCE editor extension for Joomla allows the creation of new editor profiles for unauthenticated users, ultimately resulting in PHP code upload and execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the JCE editor extension for Joomla allows unauthenticated attackers to create new editor profiles, enabling them to upload and execute arbitrary PHP code. This can lead to full system compromise, data breaches, and unauthorized access to sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the JCE editor extension to the latest patched version if available, or disable it temporarily if no patch is available.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious activity targeting this vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of your Joomla installation to identify and remediate any unauthorized changes or backdoors.

title: Graphite before 1.3.15 has an integer underflow and resultant out-of-bounds write via Graphite...
description: Graphite before 1.3.15 has an integer underflow and resultant out-of-bounds write via Graphite actions, because slotat does not ensure that an offset is within the allowed slot-map range.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Graphite before version 1.3.15 allows an attacker to exploit an integer underflow, leading to an out-of-bounds write. This could result in memory corruption, application crashes, or potential remote code execution, posing a significant risk to systems using the affected version.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to Graphite version 1.3.15 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of systems using Graphite to identify and patch any outdated versions.
Implement runtime monitoring and intrusion detection systems to identify and mitigate potential exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability was found in bytedance InfiniStore up to 0.2.33. The impacted element is the...
description: A vulnerability was found in bytedance InfiniStore up to 0.2.33. The impacted element is the function purge_kv_map in the library /src/infinistore.h of the component KV Map Handler. Performing a manipulation results in inefficient algorithmic complexity. The attack requires a local approach. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11312.

The function morse_dot11ah_find_s1g_caps_for_bssid() uses the IE length

title:
In Znuny LTS before 6.5.21 and Znuny before 7.3.3, there is reflected XSS in 
...
description:
In Znuny LTS before 6.5.21 and Znuny before 7.3.3, there is reflected XSS in 

AdminCommunicationLog (aka the communication log administration view).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks in the AdminCommunicationLog view, potentially leading to the theft of session cookies, user credentials, or the execution of malicious scripts in the context of the affected application.

title: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the morse.ko HaLow Wi-Fi kernel driver in Morse...
description: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the morse.ko HaLow Wi-Fi kernel driver in Morse Micro HaLowLink 2 software versions prior to 2.11.13 allows an unauthenticated attacker within radio range to cause a Denial of Service (kernel panic) or potentially achieve Remote Code Execution via a crafted 802.11ah beacon frame containing a malformed Traffic Indication Map (TIM) Information Element. The function morse_page_slicing_process_tim_element() in page_slicing.c derives the TIM bitmap length

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker within radio range to cause a Denial of Service (kernel panic) or potentially achieve Remote Code Execution, which could lead to system compromise or service disruption.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to Morse Micro HaLowLink 2 software version 2.11.13 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of all devices using the affected morse.ko HaLow Wi-Fi kernel driver to identify potential exposure.
Implement network segmentation and monitor for anomalous 802.11ah traffic to mitigate potential exploitation.

title: OpenAI Atlas before 1.2025.288.15 exposed privileged browser APIs to web content on *.openai.com...
description: OpenAI Atlas before 1.2025.288.15 exposed privileged browser APIs to web content on *.openai.com origins. A cross-site scripting vulnerability in forum.openai.com could be used to access these functions, allowing access to browser history information and the ability to open or close tabs. OpenAI Atlas 1.2025.288.15 narrows access to these APIs to *.chatgpt.com; users should upgrade to 1.2025.288.15 or later.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11326.

title: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to...
description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code within a sandboxed environment by exploiting a use-after-free issue in PDFium. While the sandbox limits broader system compromise, the flaw could still be leveraged for further exploitation or data exfiltration.
recommended_actions: Update Google Chrome to version 149.0.7827.53 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement strict monitoring for suspicious PDF file activity and sandbox escape attempts.
Educate employees on the risks of opening untrusted or unexpected PDF files.

title: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to...
description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code within a sandboxed environment by exploiting a use-after-free issue in PDFium when processing crafted PDF files. This could lead to potential compromise of sensitive data or further exploitation within the sandbox.
recommended_actions: Update Google Chrome to version 149.0.7827.53 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement strict monitoring and filtering of PDF files received from untrusted sources.
Educate employees about the risks of opening PDF files from unknown or suspicious sources.

title: CVE-2025-11262 - The Link Whisper Free plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the user
description: The Link Whisper Free plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the user_id parameter in all versions up to, and including, 0.9.0 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-11262.

title: CVE-2026-9714 - The Simple Divi Shortcode plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the
description: The Simple Divi Shortcode plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'id' parameter of the [showmodule] shortcode in versions up to, and including, 1.2 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in the showmodule_shortcode() function, which concatenates the 'id' shortcode attribute directly into a dynamically constructed shortcode string without applying esc_attr() or any escaping, allowing an attacker to break out of the attribute context and inject arbitrary HTML. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9714.

title: CVE-2026-9493 - Service Center developed by BankPro E-Service Technology has an Insecure Direct Object Reference vul
description: Service Center developed by BankPro E-Service Technology has an Insecure Direct Object Reference vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to modify the parameter of a specific query function to access other users' EC order details.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9493.

title: CVE-2026-8732 - The WP Maps Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Administrator Account
description: The WP Maps Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Administrator Account Creation in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.0. This is due to the wpgmp_temp_access_ajax AJAX action being registered with wp_ajax_nopriv_ and protected only by a nonce check using the fc-call-nonce nonce, which is publicly embedded into every frontend page via wp_localize_script as the nonce field of the wpgmp_local JavaScript object, rendering the check ineffective as an access control mechanism. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to invoke the wpgmp_temp_access_support handler with check_temp=false, which unconditionally creates a new WordPress user with the hardcoded role of administrator via wp_insert_user() and returns a magic login URL that, when visited, calls wp_set_auth_cookie() to fully authenticate the attacker as the newly created administrator, resulting in complete site takeover.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8732.

title: CVE-2026-6324 - A flaw was found in libsoup. A remote attacker could exploit an unsigned to signed conversion error
description: A flaw was found in libsoup. A remote attacker could exploit an unsigned to signed conversion error in the `soup_body_input_stream_read_chunked()` function by sending a malicious HTTP request. This vulnerability occurs when libsoup operates behind a non-libsoup proxy server or as a proxy in front of a non-libsoup backend server. Successful exploitation can allow an attacker to bypass security controls, poison web caches, or gain unauthorized access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6324.

title: CVE-2026-6275 - The StatCounter – Free Real Time Visitor Stats plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Si
description: The StatCounter – Free Real Time Visitor Stats plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in versions up to, and including, 2.1.1 This is due to insufficient output escaping on the post author's nickname in the statcounter_addToTags() function. The function is hooked to wp_head and fires on every single post page. It retrieves the post author's nickname via the_author_meta() and echoes it directly into a JavaScript double-quoted string context inside a <script> block without applying esc_js() or any equivalent JavaScript-context escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers with Author-level access and above to inject arbitrary web scripts into pages that will execute whenever any user (including unauthenticated visitors) accesses a post authored by the attacker.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6275.

title: CVE-2025-14042 - The Automotive Car Dealership Business WordPress Theme for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-S
description: The Automotive Car Dealership Business WordPress Theme for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'Project Details' custom field in Portfolio Items in all versions up to, and including, 13.4.1. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user-supplied attributes in the 'project_details' custom field. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level permissions and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14042.

title: CVE-2025-11993 - The WooCommerce Infinite Scroll and Ajax Pagination plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to PHP Object
description: The WooCommerce Infinite Scroll and Ajax Pagination plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to PHP Object Injection in all versions up to, and including, 1.8 via the 'settings' parameter in the 'import_settings' function. This is due to deserialization of untrusted data supplied via the import configuration feature without capability checks. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to inject a PHP Object. No POP chain is present within the vulnerable plugin itself, but if a POP chain is present via an additional plugin or theme installed on the target system, it could allow an attacker to delete arbitrary files, retrieve sensitive data, or execute code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-11993.

title: CVE-2026-2128 - The Breeze plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorize
description: The Breeze plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor in all versions up to, and including, 2.5.2 This is due to improper verification of the `wordpress_logged_in_` cookie in the `inc/cache/execute-cache.php` file when the "Cache Logged-in Users" setting is enabled. The plugin parses the username directly from the cookie value (e.g., `username|hash`) using `substr()` to retrieve the corresponding cache file but fails to verify the session's cryptographic signature or validity with WordPress core. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to supply a crafted cookie (e.g., `wordpress_logged_in_fake=admin|fake`) to trick the plugin into serving the cached HTML content generated for an administrator, leading to the disclosure of sensitive information such as private posts (including their full content), the Admin Bar, WordPress nonces, and other data visible only to logged-in administrators or other users.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2128.

title: CVE-2026-8995 - The Poll Maker – Versus Polls, Anonymous Polls, Image Polls plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Se
description: The Poll Maker – Versus Polls, Anonymous Polls, Image Polls plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in versions up to and including 6.3.7. This is due to insufficient access controls on the 'ays_poll_get_user_information' AJAX action, which serializes and returns the complete WP_User object — including the user_pass (bcrypt password hash), user_email, user_login, user_registered, roles, and all capabilities — without any nonce verification or capability check beyond is_user_logged_in(). This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to retrieve sensitive account data including their own password hash, which WordPress does not expose through any of its standard interfaces and which can be leveraged for offline password-cracking attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8995.

title: CVE-2026-7430 - The Post Snippets plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions
description: The Post Snippets plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 4.0.19. This is due to insufficient output escaping of imported snippet content when rendering JavaScript variables in the post editor. Specifically, the `jqueryUiDialog()` method in `WPEditor.php` embeds snippet content directly into JavaScript string literals without escaping double quotes (the quote-escaping code on line 214 is commented out). When snippets are imported via the Import/Export feature, the content bypasses WordPress's `wp_magic_quotes()` (which would otherwise add protective backslashes), allowing double quotes in snippet content to break out of the JavaScript string context. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Administrator-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts via a malicious import file that execute whenever any administrator accesses a post editor page. Please note that this does not affect single-site installations as administrators already have the `unfiltered_html` capability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7430.

title: CVE-2026-7480 - An Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource vulnerability in ASUS System Control Interf
description:
An Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource vulnerability in ASUS System Control Interface allows a local user to elevate privileges to SYSTEM and execute arbitrary code via a crafted RPC call that bypass the validation mechanism.
Refer to the 'Security Update for ASUS System Control Interface' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

title: CVE-2026-6892 - Improper handling of symbolic links in the installer of CUPS Printer Driver for macOS(*) may allow a
description:
Improper handling of symbolic links in the installer of CUPS Printer Driver for macOS(*) may allow a local attacker with login privileges to exploit a specially crafted symbolic link during installation to modify permissions of directories for which they would not normally have authorization. 

*:Canon PIXUS iX6800 Series CUPS Printer Driver for macOS Version 16.91.0.0 or earlier (Japan)

Canon PIXMA MG2500 Series and iX6800 Series CUPS Printer Driver for macOS Version 16.91.0.0 or earlier (US and Europe)

description: Improper handling of symbolic links in the installer of My Image Garden for macOS Version 3.6.8 or earlier may allow a local attacker with login privileges to exploit a specially crafted symbolic link during installation to modify permissions of files for which they would not normally have authorization.
